scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,REALTIME,WEB -c cyan,yellow,green "yarn workspace @socionet/api dev" "yarn workspace @socionet/realtime dev" "yarn workspace @socionet/web dev"
scripts.build: yarn workspace @socionet/api build && yarn workspace @socionet/realtime build && yarn workspace @socionet/web build
scripts.setup: cp .env.example .env && echo '✅ .env created — fill in your values'
